title: APNS-199 A Sexual Service Female S*****t At The Cafeteria Ichika Matsumoto
description: A certain abandoned warehouse. There, multiple debtors were busy with the hard work of industrial waste disposal. One day, one of the workers, Nakata, escapes from the warehouse. Along the way, Ichika, a female student who was doing club activities at a nearby playground, passed by Nakata. Nakata attacks Ichika, believing that he was "looked down" by Ichika's frosty gaze. Take it to the warehouse and lay it down like crazy. Other workers joined in, and the curtain of a gruesome and absurd sexual feast came up ... [* The image and sound may be distorted, but please note that this is not a defect of the product itself.]
maker: オーロラプロジェクト・アネックス
